'''Troobs''' were one of the two variants of the [[Tahlboorean]]s, the others being the [[Hobor]]s. The two races were constantly at war. The Troobs had blue skin, and embraced technology and [[The galaxy/Legends|Galactic]] society. Around [[6 BBY/Legends|5.5 BBY]] their leader was [[General/Legends|General]] [[Krax]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Protocol Offensive]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
